pi_items.source: Checked setup_task.sh which prepares the parent directory and export_result.sh which explicitly hardcodes this file path to export results.
Checked setup_task.sh which generates exactly 6 images (1 suspect and 5 foils) using ImageMagick.

Derived from the problem description which mandates a 2x3 grid, cross-referenced with verifier.py which evaluates the unique X and Y coordinates to ensure a 2x3 or 3x2 grid layout is achieved for the 6 images.

Derived from the problem description which mandates a 2x3 grid, cross-referenced with verifier.py which evaluates the unique X and Y coordinates to ensure a 2x3 or 3x2 grid layout is achieved for the 6 images.
Checked setup_task.sh which sets ASSET_DIR to this path and creates the synthetic face images inside it.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires saving the PsychoPy experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/eyewitness/lineup_task.psyexp. It uses 6 synthetic face images (1 suspect and 5 foils) that are generated in /home/ga/Documents/TaskData/faces during task setup. The layout is verified to be a 2-row by 3-column grid (or equivalent coordinates).
